_comment: Custom glyph definitions — single source of truth for tools/build_client_patch.py. IDs: glyph_id 1501+, item_entry 100001+ (must stay above native max ~57576), apply_spell 200001+, marker_spell 200101+. type minor|major decides the socket. handler display|proc|none drives spelldraft_glyphs.lua (display data = 'formAuraIds:displayId', proc data = recipe key in spelldraft_re.lua). effect_spell: set to a native aura spell id to let the core apply a real effect (marker_spell then unused). socket_icon = SpellIcon id drawn in the glyph socket (UI-Glyph-Rune-* range 3110-3128); spell_icon = SpellIcon id for the glyph's spells (ability art).

glyphs.name: Glyph of the Orca
glyphs.tooltip: While in Aquatic Form, you take the shape of a mighty orca.

glyphs.name: Glyph of the Zealot
glyphs.tooltip: Your melee strikes have a 10% chance to unleash an Exorcism upon your target. (8 sec cooldown)
